SNB remains ready to intervene in forex market if necessary.

Equiduct adds iBroker to Apex, expanding Best Execution service; iBroker is top online broker for derivatives in Spain.
news.summary: Equiduct, a retail-focused pan-European exchange based in Madrid, revealed on December 12, 2024, that iBroker Global Markets S.V. has joined its Best Execution service, Apex. iBroker, the top online broker for listed derivatives in Spain, is the most recent trading participant to join Equiduct.

news.headline: Learn about crypto wallets: they store private keys, digital codes for accessing cryptocurrencies instead of physical money.
news.summary: Crypto wallets do not hold physical money, but rather store private keys in the form of digital codes. These keys provide access to cryptocurrencies, serving as a means of securing and managing digital assets. This method offers a secure way for individuals to manage their crypto holdings, with private keys acting as the safeguard to their funds.

news.headline: Stock futures down, Ciena Corp. expected to report earnings of 66 cents per share on $1.10B revenue; Adobe posts impressive Q4 results.
news.summary: Today, U.S. stock futures are trading lower, with certain stocks catching the attention of investors. Ciena Corporation (NYSE: CIEN) is expected to announce quarterly earnings of 66 cents per share with revenue hitting $1.10 billion before the market opens. In after-hours trading, Ciena shares rose by 1.3% to $74.15. Meanwhile, Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ: ADBE) reported strong earnings and sales for the fourth quarter, surpassing expectations. The company provided a first-quarter revenue forecast in the range of [exact figure not provided]. Detailed news can be found on Benzinga.com.

BODW 2024 concludes with 15,000 attendees, paving path for sustainable future. France Italy named partner country for BODW 2025.
news.summary: France and Italy have been selected as Partner Country for BODW 2025, marking a strategic move towards sustainability and innovation. BODW 2024, held in Hong Kong on December 12, 2024, served as Asia's leading international design and innovation event. This partnership sets the stage for a forward-thinking approach, emphasizing collaboration and creativity to pave the way for a sustainable future. The event aims to bring together key players in the design industry to foster dialogue and exchange ideas. Stay tuned for more updates as this partnership unfolds.

Swiss National Bank sees uncertainty in US economic policy and rising political uncertainty in Europe
SNB expects GDP growth of about 1% for current year
Swiss National Bank predicts slight rise in unemployment and decline in production capacity utilization
51Talk to report Q3 2024 financial results on December 13, 2024 at 8:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: A global online education platform, 51Talk Online Education Group, will be holding an Earnings Call at 8:00 a.m. ET on December 13, 2024. The Company, listed on NYSE American as COE, specializes in English education. The Earnings Call was announced on December 12, 2024 in Singapore.

news.headline: WuXi Biologics (2269.HK) featured in UNGC 20 case examples of sustainable development, aims for a healthier future.
news.summary: A pioneering environmentally friendly Contract Research, Development, and Manufacturing Organization (CRDMO) is spearheading innovation towards a healthier future by providing comprehensive green biologics solutions for the industry as a whole. As of December 12, 2024, Shanghai-based WuXi Biologics ("WuXi Bio") (Stock symbol: 2269.HK) stands as a top global player in the field.

news.headline: General Inception acquires Enable Medicine, forming a strategic partnership to enhance drug discovery with AI-led generative biological search.
news.summary: Enable Medicine is leading the way in utilizing generative AI models to analyze extensive cellular atlases of disease for uncovering novel therapeutic insights. This partnership will significantly enhance the drug discovery and development capabilities of the two companies. This collaboration follows their initial partnership, which resulted in a successful outcome...

news.headline: SpliceBio's SB-007 receives FDA clearance for Phase 1/2 study in Stargardt Disease Patients; trial to start in H1 2025.
news.summary: SB-007, the sole IND-cleared clinical-stage treatment targeting the underlying cause of Stargardt disease with the ability to assist all patients with any ABCA4 mutations, is preparing for Phase 1/2 ASTRA trial initiation by the first half of 2025. The study is bolstered by POLARIS, a cutting-edge company sponsor.

news.headline: Neuraxpharm and Pharmathen to co-develop long-acting injectable therapies for CNS disorders, enhancing patient choices.
news.summary: Cutting-edge treatments are revolutionizing the management of central nervous system (CNS) disorders, offering patients in BARCELONA, Spain, DÜSSELDORF, Germany, and ATHENS, Greece more options and control. Neuraxpharm Group, a top European specialty pharmaceutical company, is at the forefront of this innovation. With these advancements, an increasing number of patients will benefit from improved therapies, marking a significant advancement in healthcare.

Schur Finance, related to Hans W. Schur, bought 22,000 SPG shares at DKK 295.6177 each for a total of DKK 6,503,589.40.
news.summary: On the previous day, Schur Finance a/s, which has ties to Chairman Hans W. Schur who also serves as the Managing Director of the company, purchased 22,000 SPG shares with the ID Code DK0061027356. This acquisition was made at a rate of DKK 295.6177 per share, amounting to a total of DKK 6,503,589.40.

news.headline: Stay tuned for updates on ECB's last policy meeting of 2024. For important insights and numbers, keep an eye out.
China's goods trade hit 39.79 trillion yuan ($5.6 trillion) in Jan-Nov, up 4.9%, driving global trade growth.
news.summary: As per data published on the General Administration of Customs' official website, China's goods trade hit a total value of 39.79 trillion yuan ($5.6 trillion) between January and November 2024, showing a 4.9% increase.

news.headline: El Salvador expanding crypto partnerships, including Argentina, with discussions ongoing with 25+ countries.
news.summary: El government of El Salvador has joined forces with Argentina to enhance the digital assets sector, engaging in discussions with more than 25 countries to establish similar collaborations.

news.headline: Careverse debuts at RSNA 2024 in Chicago, the top medical event in radiology community.展 In approximately 120 characters.
news.summary: In early December 2024, during the period from the 1st to the 5th, Chicago was the host city for RSNA 2024, the premier global radiology event known for its forward-looking approach. Among the highlights was the unveiling of Careverse at the AI Showcase section, marking the official launch of the innovative platform during the conference. The event brought together a large number of medical professionals and industry leaders, emphasizing the significance of advancements in radiology and healthcare technology.

news.headline: Nippon Gases partners with Juniper Networks for AI-Native Networking, boosting innovation. (Characters: 82)
news.summary: In Amsterdam, Juniper Networks, a prominent player in secure, AI-Native Networking, unveiled that Nippon Gases, a major European industrial gas company, has integrated Juniper’s AI-Native wired and wireless LAN solutions. This implementation aims to improve mobile experiences within Nippon Gases’s IT and operational technology (OT) setups, while also simplifying network operations to stimulate digital growth. The move is part of Juniper’s AI-Native Networking Platform.

news.headline: GlobalPlatform's SESIP helps IoT manufacturers comply with EU's new Cyber Resilience Act, aiming to enhance cybersecurity.
news.summary: A California-based organization, GlobalPlatform, is urging makers of connected devices and parts to adhere to its "Security Evaluation Standard for IoT Platforms" (SESIP) to show compliance with the European Union's recently effective Cyber Resilience Act (CRA). The CRA, implemented this month, seeks to enhance and standardize cybersecurity throughout the EU through a fresh legal structure for all internet-connected products. This move places emphasis on boosting security measures for IoT devices by conforming to specified standards outlined by SESIP.

news.headline: Tineco offers exclusive deals for a cozy Christmas at home with competitive prices on selected models. Available on Amazon from December 9th to 22nd.
news.summary: During the holiday season, Tineco is offering exclusive discounts on selected models from December 9th to 22nd. The Tineco Floor One Stretch S6, known for its innovation and flexibility, is available at competitive prices on Amazon. The S6 can bend up to 180°, making it ideal for reaching tricky spots in your home. Don't miss this opportunity to grab last-minute Christmas gifts or upgrade your cleaning routine!

news.headline: Get your home ready for Christmas with Tineco's FLOOR ONE series for a cozy and clean atmosphere. Includes FLOOR ONE STRETCH S6.
news.summary: In NEUSS, Germany, as Christmas approaches, the demand for a tidy home is rising alongside the festive spirit. Tineco introduces its FLOOR ONE series on Amazon to cater to this need, providing innovative solutions for a sparkling home during the holiday season without any hassle. The standout product, FLOOR ONE STRETCH S6, combines flexibility and performance, making it a perfect fit for households focusing on comfort. This product offers efficient cleaning solutions to ensure homes are ready for the holiday season.

news.headline: Western Gate supports Grupo DIA's financial moves. Believes reverse stock split is vital. Sees it necessary due to undervaluation.
news.summary: In London, Western Gate has expressed support for yesterday’s release about DIA’s financing deal and reverse stock split. The company believes these measures are necessary within a strategic plan the Board must execute to combat DIA’s undervaluation compared to competitors and bolster market liquidity. Western Gate has actively pushed the Board in recent years to make essential changes at DIA.

Outfit7 introduces Fashion Editor feature in My Talking Angela 2 to celebrate the game's 10th anniversary.
news.summary: In Limassol, Cyprus on December 12, 2024, Outfit7 marked the 10th year of My Talking Angela by launching a new premium feature in My Talking Angela 2 called the Fashion Editor. This innovative feature offers players a platform to showcase their creativity and style with unmatched freedom.

news.headline: BOS and Tenstorrent reveal Eagle-N, Auto AI Accelerator Chiplet SoC; To be unveiled at CES2025.
news.summary: At CES2025 in Seoul, South Korea, BOS Semiconductors and Tenstorrent will unveil Eagle-N, the inaugural chiplet AI accelerator for the automotive sector. This groundbreaking development marks a collaboration between the Korean automotive fabless company and the AI design firm, promising significant advancements in automotive technology. Scheduled for introduction on December 12, 2024, this innovation holds immense promise for the industry's future.

news.headline: JOYFIT's DeerRun to launch smart treadmills in Germany, expanding fitness solutions; entering market on Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, JOYFIT, a well-known sports technology company based in the United States, revealed the launch of its prominent home fitness equipment line, DeerRun, in Germany. This expansion brings DeerRun's cutting-edge products to the German market, catering to a gap in the fitness industry.

news.headline: Sylva Project at Linux Foundation Europe unveils long-term plan for telco infrastrcture amid 5G growth, 6G emergence.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Brussels, the Sylva Project, operating under the Linux Foundation Europe, is making strides in telecommunications. With the progression of 5G and the rise of 6G technologies, Sylva aims to shape the future by concentrating on creating a cloud-native infrastructure.

news.headline: Clarivate introduces AI-powered patent search in Derwent for improved IP decision-making. Launch on Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: Today, Clarivate Plc (NYSE: CLVT) introduced AI Search in Derwent™ to provide quicker and more pertinent results for informed IP decision-making. The innovative tool utilizes artificial intelligence (AI) to enhance search capabilities. This launch is set to revolutionize the industry, showcasing Clarivate Plc's commitment to cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: PQShield boosts board with new appointments, gears for 2025 growth: Antonio J. Viana appointed to board of directors, along with Mike Muller, Rose Schooler, and Ian Drew joining advisory board. Janssen Liston promoted as VP of Sales.
news.summary: PQShield, a top cybersecurity firm specializing in post-quantum cryptography, has welcomed Antonio J. Viana to its board of directors. Additionally, Mike Muller, Rose Schooler, and Ian Drew have joined its strategic advisory board. Janssen Liston has been promoted to Vice President of Sales within the company.
